Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Jul-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court rules as follows:

PETITIONER FRANKLIN SQUARE OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Petition to Approve first amended and restated declaration of covenants, conditions and restrictions and amendment to section 10.10 of said declaration pursuant to california civil code section 4275 is Granted. Order is signed in Open court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
